WHEN TRYING TO ACCELERATE RAPIDLY FROM A STANDING OR SLOW MOVING POSITION THE CAR STALLS OFTEN TIMES LEAVING YOU MOMENTARILY STOPPED IN THE FACE OF ONCOMING TRAFFIC.THIS ACTION IS SPORADIC, IT DOES NOT HAPPEN EVERY TIME YOU MASH THE ACCELERATOR FOR TAKE-OFF . THE DEALER MECHANIC

narrative.headline: What 2016 Subaru Impreza owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 75 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (19% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
